response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack and some agentic/MCP exposure, but the role requires an executive CTO with 5+ years senior technical leadership, production multi-agent AI systems at scale, fintech infrastructure depth, and experience scaling teams from 10 to 30+. The resume shows no people-management, no org-scaling, no board-level communication, and only light, recent agentic AI work. The seniority and leadership gap is too large to bridge for a CTO seat at a venture-backed scale-up.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background across web, backend, embedded, and low-latency systems
Some exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at Google
Strong software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: No evidence of engineering leadership, team scaling, or direct reports
No production multi-agent AI systems ownership in regulated/high-stakes environments
No fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or real-time trade decisioning experience

key_factors.factor: Missing production multi-agent AI systems experience
